sections.title: Priority Heroes
sections.intro: First complete the minimal PVE requirement before going to the [Endgame Priority List].

heroes.name: Tsuki
heroes.summary: Cheap & effective early game with filler and easy-to-get Mystifiers [Dullahan, Bastet, Emily..]
heroes.notes: Best beginner's start if starting with the event selector which has her, purchase the 2nd copy for Oracle's and snowball to infinity.

heroes.name: Jorm
heroes.summary: If you decide to not go for Tsuki 7 with the Event selector card, you can go for Jorm, Jorm will struggle more in the Palace of Penrose rush, but should give better results in the Celestial Trials rush
heroes.notes: Needs 7-stars to be as good (better) than Elisha.

heroes.name: Elisha
heroes.summary:
A content-clearing machine; effective at 6* 
If starting with Elisha, she must be first to 7-stars because a 6-stars A. Dorabella doesn't cut it.
heroes.source: If you did not start during Event DD Selector, start with a 6-star Elisha from the Oracle Shop.
heroes.notes:
6★ – Provides strong teamwide buffs.  
7★ – Becomes a carry unit (weaker than Pandora).

heroes.name: Arc. Dorabella
heroes.summary: Does require 7-stars to be top tier, so only get her once you've either Tsuki 7 + Elisha 6 or Jorm 7 + Elisha 6.

heroes.name: Pandora
heroes.summary: Has insane scaling even at low star level (7★), and becomes significantly stronger at 8/9/10★, especially with exclusive runes. Best Single-Target DPS.

heroes.name: Leviathan
heroes.summary:
High reflect rate lets her cheese a good amount of PVE. 
Also serves as a decent Tsuki counter — somewhat unreliable at 7★, but still effective.

heroes.name: S. Aiush
heroes.summary: Pretty good unit due to extra combo attack to all allies (work on Pledge too) and requirement in RO.

heroes.name: Gaia
heroes.summary: Works amazingly due to Damage Reduction and Ignore Damage Reduction. 7* Is required only for PVP.
heroes.source: Should be bought after your Elisha is 6, Dahlia 7, Pandora 7 [Oracle Shop].
heroes.notes:
6★ – Provides strong teamwide buffs.  
7★ – Provides a speed advantage, which is big but only in PVP (ignore PVP until you can clear RO).

heroes.name: Wu Zetian
heroes.summary: Similar to Aphrodite, but usable from 6* in most PVE. However, she greatly benefits from exclusive runes for improved survivability.
heroes.notes: Usable at 6 in both PVE and PVP, but excels with 2 Epic 2 Legendary Exclusive Runes.

heroes.name: Behemoth
heroes.summary: Strong in PVP, decent in PVE once she dies to provide the buffs, slightly cheaper than WuZ early on but WuZ with 2-2 runes replace her eventually.
heroes.notes: Not really used much in PvE so when spending on her be aware it's purely PvP.

heroes.name: Aphrodite
heroes.summary: At 7*, she unlocks her Phantom Illusion effect, making her viable in both PVP and PVE. Ideally, she benefits most from reaching 8* for Monarch synergy. You can pair her with any team anywhere.
heroes.notes: The PVP Queen, requires 7* and slots in ANY team. Get her to 8* for Monarch Synergy as well!

heroes.name: Hades
heroes.summary: At 7*, he unlocks his Devour effect, making him viable in both PVP and PVE. Ideally, he benefits from having legendary (or 2-2) runes for prolonged fights.
heroes.notes: Requires 7* to be usable in PVE and legendary runes for PVP.

sections.title: Selector Heroes - Don't waste Oracle's On Them

heroes.name: Ophelia
heroes.summary: Pairs well with any HP% inc. hero, with incredible value due to HP-to-ATK conversions. Sanctuary is a nice bonus but not essential. A must-have for any kind of PVE.
heroes.source: Get her from the Abyss 100 Card first!
heroes.notes: A high value hero in PVE even till late-game, usable in PVP.

heroes.name: Dahlia
heroes.summary: Slowly losing out on her value but still can be found in the clear records
heroes.source: Get her from the Hell 100 or any other selector cards, or purchase from Oracle store as needed.
heroes.notes:
6★ – Sufficient if relying on RNG.  
7★ – Guarantees 100% copy buffs.
8★ – Purely for PvP Phantoms

heroes.name: Mulan
heroes.summary: Since her release, she’s been a staple in every Rift Odyssey due to her burn % damage, which is also invaluable in other PVE content, making it much easier to clear. She's viable in PVP when paired with AoE heroes that can apply her burn.
heroes.notes: No longer needed due to Power Creep & Magatama being F2P-viable

heroes.name: Astrid
heroes.summary: Her unique skill (double ultimate for the hero casting second) remains useful everywhere, most commonly paired with Atropos or Cleopatra for higher ATK boosts.
heroes.notes: In Niche category because she's no longer worth spending Oracles on.

heroes.name: Elmer
heroes.summary:
Get him from the Day 7 Selector Card to 6* and with the Goddess Trials card to 7* 
Do not spend Oracles on him
heroes.notes: Easy to get to 7* for basically, free.

heroes.name: Elowyn
heroes.summary: Current Niche being RO due to multiple actions.
heroes.notes: Mainly a Lamia bot in PVE although she's great due to Awaken buff.

heroes.name: Lamia
heroes.summary: Current Niche being RO due to multiple actions.
